heading: Omitted
label: 967d Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized the prescription of rules and regulations to carry out the provisions of former sections 967a to 967d of this title, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 89–717, § 480 Stat. 1115Nov. 2, 1966
